Operation 'listDisbursements' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic and lack actionable details. Added information about pagination support, filtering/sorting capabilities, return structure, and use case context to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of disbursements.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all disbursements for the authenticated account. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns an array of disbursement objects containing disbursement ID, status, amount, recipient details, and timestamps. Use this operation to view disbursement history and track outgoing payments.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack actionable details. Added information about pagination support, filtering/sorting capabilities, return structure, and use case context to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

message: Operation 'getDisbursement' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the operation's practical use cases. Enhanced to clarify the return structure, include relevant DisbursementAttributes context, and explain when an AI agent should use this operation versus the list operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific disbursement.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific disbursement by ID. Returns the complete disbursement object including status, amount, recipient bank account details, reference information, and transaction timestamps. Use this operation to check the status of a disbursement or retrieve full disbursement details for reconciliation purposes.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks specificity about what details are returned and the operation's practical use cases. Enhanced to clarify the return structure, include relevant DisbursementAttributes context, and explain when an AI agent should use this operation versus the list operation.

message: Operation 'getBalance' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is minimal and lacks context about currency, use cases, and practical implications. Enhanced to specify SGD currency (consistent with Singapore payments context), clarify the balance represents available funds for transactions, and explain when AI agents should call this operation (pre-transaction verification).

data.current_description: Retrieve the current account balance.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current account balance for the authenticated account. Returns the available balance in SGD that can be used for payments and disbursements. This operation reflects real-time account funds and should be called before initiating transactions to verify sufficient balance.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks context about currency, use cases, and practical implications. Enhanced to specify SGD currency (consistent with Singapore payments context), clarify the balance represents available funds for transactions, and explain when AI agents should call this operation (pre-transaction verification).

message: Operation 'createPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on inputs (what payment details are required), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (payment request becomes available). Enhanced version specifies supported payment methods consistent with API purpose, clarifies required inputs, describes return value, and explains the resulting state change for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create a one-time payment request via PayNow QR or other supported methods.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a one-time payment request via PayNow QR, Virtual Account, or other supported payment methods. Accepts payment details including amount, currency, and customer information. Returns a payment object with a unique payment ID and status. The payment request is immediately available for customer payment.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on inputs (what payment details are required), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (payment request becomes available). Enhanced version specifies supported payment methods consistent with API purpose, clarifies required inputs, describes return value, and explains the resulting state change for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'listPayments' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, mentions parameter support for filtering/sorting, specifies what payment attributes are returned, and explains ordering for better AI agent understanding of pagination and filtering capabilities.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of payments.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all payments. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns an array of payment objects with their current status, amount, and payment method details. Results are ordered by creation date.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, mentions parameter support for filtering/sorting, specifies what payment attributes are returned, and explains ordering for better AI agent understanding of pagination and filtering capabilities.

data.current_description: Retrieve details of a specific payment.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete details of a specific payment by its ID. Returns the payment object including amount, currency, status, payment method, customer information, and transaction timestamps. Use this to check payment status or retrieve payment attributes.

data.current_description: Update an existing payment.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing payment's attributes such as description, metadata, or other mutable fields. Accepts a payment ID and update payload. Returns the updated payment object. Only certain payment fields can be modified depending on the payment status. Partial updates are supported.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about what can be updated and what happens. data.current_description: Create a static PayNow QR code for unlimited payments.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a static PayNow QR code that can be reused for unlimited payments. Accepts payment method configuration including reference ID and optional metadata. Returns a payment method object containing the QR code identifier and details. The QR code becomes immediately available for customer scanning and payment.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks input requirements and output details. Enhanced version clarifies what configuration is needed, specifies what is returned (payment method object with QR identifier), and explains the resulting state (QR code immediately available) for AI agents to understand the operation's full lifecycle.

data.current_description: Create a disbursement to send money.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a disbursement to send funds
data.description_suggestion: Creates a disbursement to send money to a recipient's bank account in Singapore. Accepts disbursement details including recipient information, amount, currency, and bank account details. Returns a disbursement object with a unique disbursement ID and status. The disbursement is queued for processing and will be settled according to the configured schedule.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about purpose, inputs, and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies the geographic scope (Singapore), specifies required inputs (recipient info, amount, currency, bank details), describes return value (disbursement object with ID and status), and explains the resulting state (queued for processing) for AI agents to understand the full operation context.
